publishDate: 约公元前500年至公元7世纪

zh.title: 西比林预言书全集 - 古希腊罗马女先知的神谕与末世预言 | Sibylline Oracles
zh.description: 西比林预言书（Sibylline Oracles）是古希腊罗马传统中女先知西比尔留下的神谕合集，现存14卷犹太-基督教伪典（公元前2世纪至公元7世纪），涵盖帝国兴衰、末世启示、自然灾变等预言主题。
zh.keywords: 西比林预言书,Sibylline Oracles,西比尔,古希腊预言,罗马预言,末世预言,神谕,女先知,古典预言
zh.ogTitle: 西比林预言书全集 | Sibylline Oracles
zh.ogDescription: 古希腊罗马女先知西比尔的神谕合集，现存14卷犹太-基督教伪典，涵盖帝国兴衰与末世启示。
zh.twitterDescription: 西比林预言书：古希腊罗马女先知的神谕合集，涵盖帝国兴亡、末世预言与历史验证。

en.title: Sibylline Oracles - Prophecies of the Ancient Sibyls | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: The Sibylline Oracles are a collection of oracular utterances attributed to the Sibyls, prophetic women in Greco-Roman tradition. Surviving as 14 books of Judeo-Christian pseudepigrapha (2nd century BC - 7th century AD), covering the fall of empires, apocalyptic visions, and cosmic upheavals.
en.keywords: Sibylline Oracles,Sibyl,Greek prophecy,Roman prophecy,ancient prophecy,apocalyptic prophecy,oracle,prophetess,classical prophecy
en.ogTitle: Sibylline Oracles - Prophecies of the Ancient Sibyls
en.ogDescription: A collection of oracular utterances from the ancient Sibyls, spanning empires, apocalyptic visions, and cosmic upheavals across 14 surviving books.
en.twitterDescription: The Sibylline Oracles: ancient Greek and Roman prophetic utterances covering the rise and fall of empires, apocalyptic visions, and historical verification.
